shellCommands.command: /bin/bash -lc "sed -n '1,240p' .agents/skills/mempal-memory/SKILL.md && printf '\\n--- files ---\\n' && rg --files -g '"'!*node_modules*'"' -g '"'!*.lock'"' | head -200 && printf '\\n--- git ---\\n' && git status --short"

/bin/bash -lc "sed -n '1,220p' package.json && printf '\\n--- next.config.ts ---\\n' && sed -n '1,220p' next.config.ts && printf '\\n--- app files ---\\n' && for f in app/page.tsx app/layout.tsx app/Recommendations.tsx app/ProductList.tsx; do echo \"--- "'$f"; sed -n '"'1,240p' \""'$f"; done'
/bin/bash -lc 'mempal search "Next.js partial pre-rendering PPR experimental config" --json --top-k 5'
/bin/bash -lc 'test -d node_modules && echo node_modules-present || echo node_modules-missing; npm ls next --depth=0'
